title: Summary: Turn 16
content: Pueblo is a CLI code agent built with TypeScript/Node.js, featuring GitHub Copilot and DeepSeek provider support, session lifecycle management, tool utilities (grep, glob, exec), and SQLite persistence. It requires Node.js 22 LTS, configures via `.pueblo/config.json`, builds to `dist/`, and launches with `node dist/cli/index.js`.
